raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 843 will make Community Choice Aggregators eligible for state green energy funding under the State’s BioMAT program.",
    "The BioMAT program supports the development of renewable bioenergy electricity projects.",
    "There are currently 23 Community Choice Aggregators serving more than 11 million customers across California.",
    "Investor-owned utilities have left green energy funds unused.",
    "Community Choice Aggregators are better equipped to make decisions on greening the energy grid compared to investor-owned utilities.",
    "Expanding the BioMAT program to include Community Choice Aggregators will accelerate the implementation of projects to meet the goals of Senate Bill 1122.",
    "The state's wildfire mitigation efforts will benefit from providing a pathway for forest waste to be put to beneficial reuse.",
    "AB 843 will help reduce wildfire risk through the use of feedstock from sustainable forest management.",
    "Biomass and biogas provide greater energy reliability by providing baseload renewable power."
  ]
}
```
